build.buildCommand: NODE_ENV=development pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @unipro-crm/api run prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @unipro-crm/api... run build

deploy.startCommand: pnpm --filter @unipro-crm/api run prisma:migrate:deploy && pnpm --filter @unipro-crm/api run start:prod
